Project

Liang Hong lh4195, Linghan Li ll6040

2025-10-29

## ===== 1. 读原始 BRFSS 数据 =====
dat_raw <- read_xpt("/Users/lianghong/Desktop/第一学期/2353 Linear Regression and Modeling/project/LLCP2022.XPT ")   # 注意不要有多余空格

## ===== 2. 基础清洗：只处理“特殊码”并保留数值编码 =====
dat <- dat_raw %>%
  mutate(
    ## 结局：MENTHLTH
    MENTHLTH = case_when(
      MENTHLTH == 88              ~ 0,          # 过去 30 天“0 天不健康”
      MENTHLTH %in% c(77, 99)     ~ NA_real_,   # 不知道/拒答
      TRUE                        ~ as.numeric(MENTHLTH)
    ),

    ## 连续协变量：睡眠时间
    SLEPTIM1 = case_when(
      SLEPTIM1 %in% c(77, 99)     ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE                        ~ as.numeric(SLEPTIM1)
    ),

    ## 吸烟相关：保持 BRFSS 原始编码（1,2,3…），只把 7/9 置为 NA
    SMOKDAY2 = ifelse(SMOKDAY2 %in% c(7, 9), NA_integer_, as.integer(SMOKDAY2)),
    SMOKE100 = ifelse(SMOKE100 %in% c(7, 9), NA_integer_, as.integer(SMOKE100)),

    ## 其他协变量：只把 7/9/77/99 这些“非数据”清掉
    EXERANY2 = ifelse(EXERANY2 %in% c(7, 9),   NA_integer_, as.integer(EXERANY2)),
    INCOME3  = ifelse(INCOME3  %in% c(77, 99), NA_integer_, as.integer(INCOME3)),
    EDUCA    = ifelse(EDUCA    == 9,          NA_integer_, as.integer(EDUCA)),
    MARITAL  = ifelse(MARITAL  %in% c(7, 9),   NA_integer_, as.integer(MARITAL)),
    EMPLOY1  = ifelse(EMPLOY1  == 9,          NA_integer_, as.integer(EMPLOY1))
  ) %>%
  ## 只保留后面会在模型里用到的变量
  select(
    MENTHLTH, SLEPTIM1, EXERANY2, `_AGEG5YR`, SEXVAR,
    INCOME3, EDUCA, MARITAL, EMPLOY1,
    SMOKDAY2, SMOKE100, `_LLCPWT`
  )

## ===== 3. 构造四类 smoke_status（在数值编码基础上） =====
## BRFSS 编码：
##   SMOKE100: 1 = smoked ≥100 cigs; 2 = <100
##   SMOKDAY2: 1 = 每天, 2 = 有时, 3 = 一点都不抽 (在当前吸烟者里)
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    smoke_status = case_when(
      SMOKE100 == 2                        ~ "Never smoker",
      SMOKE100 == 1 & SMOKDAY2 == 3        ~ "Former smoker",
      SMOKE100 == 1 & SMOKDAY2 == 1        ~ "Daily smoker",
      SMOKE100 == 1 & SMOKDAY2 == 2        ~ "Sometimes smoker",
      TRUE                                 ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

## ===== 4. 完整个案：所有建模变量必须非缺失 =====
model_vars <- c(
  "MENTHLTH","SLEPTIM1","EXERANY2","_AGEG5YR","SEXVAR",
  "INCOME3","EDUCA","MARITAL","EMPLOY1",
  "smoke_status","_LLCPWT"
)

dat_cc <- dat %>%
  filter(if_all(all_of(model_vars), ~ !is.na(.)))

## ===== 5. 抽 10,000 行作为分析样本 dat_small =====
set.seed(2025)
dat_small <- dat_cc %>%
  sample_n(10000)

## ===== 6. 在 dat_small 上做因子化 & 贴标签（方便表格 / 模型） =====
dat_small <- dat_small %>%
  mutate(
    smoke_status = factor(
      smoke_status,
      levels = c("Never smoker","Former smoker",
                 "Daily smoker","Sometimes smoker")
    ),
    EXERANY2 = factor(EXERANY2, levels = c(2, 1),
                      labels = c("No","Yes")),
    `_AGEG5YR` = factor(`_AGEG5YR`, levels = 1:14,
                        labels = c("18–24","25–29","30–34","35–39","40–44","45–49",
                                   "50–54","55–59","60–64","65–69","70–74","75–79","80–84","85+")),
    SEXVAR   = factor(SEXVAR, levels = c(2, 1),
                      labels = c("Female","Male")),
    INCOME3  = factor(INCOME3, levels = 1:8,
                      labels = c("<$10k","$10–<15k","$15–<20k","$20–<25k",
                                 "$25–<35k","$35–<50k","$50–<75k","≥$75k")),
    EDUCA    = factor(EDUCA, levels = 1:6,
                      labels = c("No school/KG","Grades 1–8","Grades 9–11",
                                 "HS/GED","Some college","College ≥4y")),
    MARITAL  = factor(MARITAL, levels = 1:6,
                      labels = c("Married","Divorced","Widowed","Separated",
                                 "Never married","Unmarried couple")),
    EMPLOY1  = factor(EMPLOY1, levels = 1:8,
                      labels = c("Employed wages","Self-employed","Out ≥1y","Out <1y",
                                 "Homemaker","Student","Retired","Unable to work"))
  )

## 检查一下四类吸烟人数，确认没问题：
table(dat_small$smoke_status)
## 
##     Never smoker    Former smoker     Daily smoker Sometimes smoker 
##             5836             2851              966              347

Empirical Data Analysis

Table 1: Overall baseline characteristics

vars_for_table1 <- c(
  "MENTHLTH", #continue
  "SLEPTIM1", #continue
  "EXERANY2", #categorical
  "_AGEG5YR", #categorical
  "SEXVAR",   #categorical
  "INCOME3",  #categorical
  "EDUCA",    #categorical
  "MARITAL",  #categorical
  "EMPLOY1",  #categorical
  "smoke_status"
)

tbl1 <- dat_small %>%
  select(all_of(vars_for_table1)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    type = list(
      MENTHLTH   ~ "continuous",
      SLEPTIM1   ~ "continuous"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous()  ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    label = list(
      MENTHLTH   ~ "Number of mentally unhealthy days (past 30 days)",
      SLEPTIM1   ~ "Sleep duration (hours per night)",
      EXERANY2   ~ "Any exercise in past 30 days",
      `_AGEG5YR` ~ "Age (5-year categories)",
      SEXVAR     ~ "Sex",
      INCOME3    ~ "Household income level",
      EDUCA      ~ "Education level",
      MARITAL    ~ "Marital status",
      EMPLOY1    ~ "Employment status",
      smoke_status   ~ "Smoking status"
    ),
    missing = "ifany"
  )

tbl1

Smoking distribution (pie chart)

dat_tab <- dat_small %>%
  select(smoke_status)

smok_tab <- table(dat_tab$smoke_status)

pie(
  smok_tab,
  labels = paste0(
    names(smok_tab), " (",
    round(100 * smok_tab / sum(smok_tab), 1), "%)"
  ),
  main = "Smoke Distribution in the Sample"
)

Smoke and Gender

dat_small %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(smoke_status),
    smoke_status != "Unknown",
    !is.na(SEXVAR)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    SEXVAR = factor(SEXVAR,
                    levels = c(1, 2),
                    labels = c("Male", "Female"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = smoke_status, fill = SEXVAR)) +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), alpha=0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Smoking Status Distribution by Sex",
    x = "Smoking Status",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Sex"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

Age and Smoke

dat_small %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(smoke_status),
    smoke_status != "Unknown"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`_AGEG5YR`, smoke_status) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop_last"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_age  = sum(n),
    proportion = n / total_age
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `_AGEG5YR`,
             y = proportion,
             color = smoke_status,
             group = smoke_status)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Smoking Trend Across Age Groups",
    x = "Age Group (5-year categories)",
    y = "Proportion of Participants",
    color = "Smoking Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

Distribution of key variables

MENTHLTH (Histogram)

ggplot(dat_small, aes(x = MENTHLTH)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Mentally Unhealthy Days",
    x = "MENTHLTH (Days)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

Boxplot: MENTHLTH vs Smoking Category

dat_plot <- dat_small %>%
  filter(!is.na(smoke_status), smoke_status != "Unknown") %>%   # 去掉 NA 和 Unknown
  mutate(
    smoke_cat = factor(
      smoke_status,
      levels = c("Never smoker", "Former smoker",
                 "Daily smoker", "Sometimes smoker")
    )
  )

ggplot(dat_plot, aes(x = smoke_cat, y = MENTHLTH, fill = smoke_cat)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 30, by = 2),
    limits = c(0, 30)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mentally Unhealthy Days by Smoking Status",
    x = "Smoking Status",
    y = "MENTHLTH (Days)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

### Density plot : MENTHLTH vs Smoking Category

dat_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = MENTHLTH, color = smoke_status, fill = smoke_status)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.25, adjust = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Density: Mentally Unhealthy Days",
    x = "MENTHLTH",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

Density plot (log-transformed): MENTHLTH vs Smoking Category

dat_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log1p(MENTHLTH), color = smoke_status, fill = smoke_status)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.25, adjust = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Log-Scaled Density: Mentally Unhealthy Days",
    x = "log(MENTHLTH + 1)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

Confounder test

Sleep time

kruskal.test(SLEPTIM1 ~ smoke_status, data = dat_small)
## 
##  Kruskal-Wallis rank sum test
## 
## data:  SLEPTIM1 by smoke_status
## Kruskal-Wallis chi-squared = 53.817, df = 3, p-value = 1.227e-11
fit_sleep <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ SLEPTIM1, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_sleep)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ SLEPTIM1, data = dat_small)
## 
## Residuals:
##    Min     1Q Median     3Q    Max 
## -8.204 -4.433 -3.805 -0.062 35.622 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  8.83221    0.39622   22.29   <2e-16 ***
## SLEPTIM1    -0.62843    0.05545  -11.33   <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.341 on 9998 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01269,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01259 
## F-statistic: 128.5 on 1 and 9998 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Exercise

tab_exer_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$EXERANY2)
chisq.test(tab_exer_smoke)   
## 
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test
## 
## data:  tab_exer_smoke
## X-squared = 171.23, df = 3, p-value < 2.2e-16
fit_exer <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ EXERANY2, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_exer)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ EXERANY2, data = dat_small)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -6.0186 -3.9671 -3.9671  0.0329 26.0329 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   6.0186     0.1735   34.68   <2e-16 ***
## EXERANY2Yes  -2.0515     0.1979  -10.36   <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.349 on 9998 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01063,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01053 
## F-statistic: 107.4 on 1 and 9998 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Age

tab_age_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$`_AGEG5YR`)
chisq.test(tab_age_smoke)
## Warning in chisq.test(tab_age_smoke): Chi-squared approximation may be
## incorrect
## 
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test
## 
## data:  tab_age_smoke
## X-squared = 584.58, df = 39, p-value < 2.2e-16
fit_age <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ `_AGEG5YR`, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_age)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ `_AGEG5YR`, data = dat_small)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -8.2247 -4.2247 -2.9173 -0.2961 27.9532

## `_AGEG5YR`25–29  -1.2891     0.5260  -2.451 0.014276 *  
## `_AGEG5YR`30–34  -1.8484     0.4960  -3.726 0.000195 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`35–39  -2.9286     0.4799  -6.103 1.08e-09 ***

## `_AGEG5YR`50–54  -3.4278     0.4731  -7.245 4.64e-13 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`55–59  -4.0537     0.4570  -8.869  < 2e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`60–64  -4.2997     0.4480  -9.598  < 2e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`65–69  -5.0798     0.4464 -11.380  < 2e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`70–74  -5.3074     0.4544 -11.680  < 2e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`75–79  -5.5362     0.4836 -11.448  < 2e-16 ***

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.248 on 9986 degrees of freedom

## F-statistic: 28.34 on 13 and 9986 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Sex

tab_sex_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$SEXVAR)
chisq.test(tab_sex_smoke)
## 
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test
## 
## data:  tab_sex_smoke
## X-squared = 79.714, df = 3, p-value < 2.2e-16
fit_sex <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ SEXVAR, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_sex)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ SEXVAR, data = dat_small)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -5.0933 -5.0933 -3.7633 -0.0933 26.2367 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   5.0933     0.1171  43.482  < 2e-16 ***
## SEXVARMale   -1.3300     0.1674  -7.945 2.14e-15 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.368 on 9998 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.006275,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.006175 
## F-statistic: 63.13 on 1 and 9998 DF,  p-value: 2.145e-15

Income

tab_inc_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$INCOME3)
chisq.test(tab_inc_smoke)
## 
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test
## 
## data:  tab_inc_smoke
## X-squared = 202.6, df = 21, p-value < 2.2e-16
fit_inc <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ INCOME3, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_inc)
##

Education

tab_edu_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$EDUCA)
chisq.test(tab_edu_smoke)

Marital

tab_mar_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$MARITAL)
chisq.test(tab_mar_smoke)
## 
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test
## 
## data:  tab_mar_smoke
## X-squared = 383.35, df = 15, p-value < 2.2e-16
fit_mar <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ MARITAL, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_mar)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ MARITAL, data = dat_small)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -6.9063 -3.8165 -3.3607 -0.3607 26.6393 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                         Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)               3.3607     0.1136  29.586  < 2e-16 ***
## MARITALDivorced           2.4589     0.2528   9.728  < 2e-16 ***
## MARITALWidowed            0.4558     0.2866   1.591    0.112    
## MARITALSeparated          3.5456     0.6088   5.824 5.92e-09 ***
## MARITALNever married      3.0702     0.2312  13.280  < 2e-16 ***
## MARITALUnmarried couple   2.5818     0.4060   6.359 2.12e-10 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.287 on 9994 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02563,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02514 
## F-statistic: 52.57 on 5 and 9994 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Employ

tab_emp_smoke <- table(dat_small$smoke_status, dat_small$EMPLOY1)
chisq.test(tab_emp_smoke)
## 
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test
## 
## data:  tab_emp_smoke
## X-squared = 590.56, df = 21, p-value < 2.2e-16
fit_emp <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ EMPLOY1, data = dat_small)
summary(fit_emp)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ EMPLOY1, data = dat_small)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -11.343  -4.427  -2.851   0.149  27.149 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                       Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)             4.4266     0.1192  37.139  < 2e-16 ***
## EMPLOY1Self-employed   -0.9479     0.3017  -3.142  0.00168 ** 
## EMPLOY1Out ≥1y          2.8500     0.6063   4.701 2.63e-06 ***
## EMPLOY1Out <1y          3.3295     0.6476   5.142 2.78e-07 ***
## EMPLOY1Homemaker        0.2150     0.4397   0.489  0.62491    
## EMPLOY1Student          3.4351     0.6063   5.666 1.51e-08 ***
## EMPLOY1Retired         -1.5755     0.1909  -8.252  < 2e-16 ***
## EMPLOY1Unable to work   6.9163     0.3645  18.975  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.151 on 9992 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.05757,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.05691 
## F-statistic:  87.2 on 7 and 9992 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Single predictor model: mental health vs smoking status

dat_simple <- dat_small %>%
  filter(!is.na(smoke_status), smoke_status != "Unknown") %>%
  mutate(
    smoke_status = factor(
      smoke_status,
      levels = c("Never smoker", "Former smoker",
                 "Daily smoker", "Sometimes smoker")
    )
  )

dat_simple <- dat_simple %>%
  mutate(
    smoke_status = relevel(smoke_status, ref = "Never smoker")
  )                                                              #Never smoker is baseline group

fit1 <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ smoke_status, data = dat_simple)
summary(fit1)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ smoke_status, data = dat_simple)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -7.0605 -4.5412 -3.8228  0.1772 26.1772 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    3.8228     0.1090  35.056  < 2e-16 ***
## smoke_statusFormer smoker      0.7184     0.1904   3.774 0.000162 ***
## smoke_statusDaily smoker       3.1265     0.2894  10.804  < 2e-16 ***
## smoke_statusSometimes smoker   3.2377     0.4603   7.034 2.14e-12 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.331 on 9996 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01521,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01492 
## F-statistic: 51.48 on 3 and 9996 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
range(fitted(fit1))
## [1] 3.822824 7.060519
range(residuals(fit1))
## [1] -7.060519 26.177176

QQ plot

res <- residuals(fit1)

qqnorm(res,
       main = "QQ Plot of Residuals for fit1",
       pch = 19,      
       cex = 0.6,       
       col = "darkblue" 
)

qqline(res, col = "red", lwd = 2)

BP test

bptest(fit1)
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  fit1
## BP = 143.83, df = 3, p-value < 2.2e-16

Multiple predictors model

fit_w <- lm(MENTHLTH ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + INCOME3 +
              EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1,
            data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`)

summary(fit_w)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + 
##     INCOME3 + EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1, 
##     data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`)
## 
## Weighted Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1459.16   -83.16   -31.17    10.66  2295.71 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                  11.49992    2.37314   4.846 1.29e-06 ***
## smoke_statusFormer smoker     1.73019    0.25712   6.729 1.84e-11 ***
## smoke_statusDaily smoker      2.72186    0.35435   7.681 1.79e-14 ***
## smoke_statusSometimes smoker  1.44954    0.48121   3.012 0.002602 ** 
## `_AGEG5YR`25–29              -0.39590    0.48651  -0.814 0.415815    
## `_AGEG5YR`30–34              -1.17736    0.50185  -2.346 0.019001 *  
## `_AGEG5YR`35–39              -1.40635    0.51903  -2.710 0.006754 ** 
## `_AGEG5YR`40–44              -0.63353    0.53537  -1.183 0.236711    
## `_AGEG5YR`45–49              -2.43188    0.58301  -4.171 3.07e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`50–54              -2.35107    0.56370  -4.171 3.07e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`55–59              -2.86023    0.57801  -4.948 7.66e-07 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`60–64              -4.87467    0.54395  -8.962  < 2e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`65–69              -4.86815    0.60458  -8.052 9.47e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`70–74              -5.33805    0.66999  -7.967 1.88e-15 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`75–79              -6.16566    0.72836  -8.465  < 2e-16 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`80–84              -5.82388    0.72654  -8.016 1.27e-15 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`85+                -5.16131    1.56032  -3.308 0.000945 ***
## SEXVARMale                   -1.26934    0.21688  -5.853 5.05e-09 ***
## INCOME3$10–<15k              -0.65261    0.74439  -0.877 0.380679    
## INCOME3$15–<20k              -0.22859    0.68722  -0.333 0.739417    
## INCOME3$20–<25k              -2.56272    0.64649  -3.964 7.44e-05 ***
## INCOME3$25–<35k              -1.79584    0.60987  -2.945 0.003244 ** 
## INCOME3$35–<50k              -2.24024    0.61310  -3.654 0.000260 ***
## INCOME3$50–<75k              -2.12645    0.61266  -3.471 0.000522 ***
## INCOME3≥$75k                 -2.75614    0.62690  -4.396 1.12e-05 ***
## EDUCAGrades 1–8              -1.57020    2.27449  -0.690 0.489996    
## EDUCAGrades 9–11              0.28602    2.23493   0.128 0.898172    
## EDUCAHS/GED                  -0.10248    2.21053  -0.046 0.963024    
## EDUCASome college             0.49382    2.21253   0.223 0.823393    
## EDUCACollege ≥4y              0.04495    2.21866   0.020 0.983836    
## EXERANY2Yes                  -1.22407    0.24438  -5.009 5.61e-07 ***
## SLEPTIM1                     -0.34679    0.06414  -5.407 6.63e-08 ***
## MARITALDivorced               1.58051    0.33398   4.732 2.26e-06 ***
## MARITALWidowed                0.51614    0.43034   1.199 0.230425    
## MARITALSeparated              0.58237    0.72016   0.809 0.418738    
## MARITALNever married          1.65691    0.30182   5.490 4.16e-08 ***
## MARITALUnmarried couple       0.70613    0.49155   1.437 0.150894    
## EMPLOY1Self-employed         -1.25085    0.37502  -3.335 0.000856 ***
## EMPLOY1Out ≥1y                1.03662    0.64270   1.613 0.106807    
## EMPLOY1Out <1y                1.74710    0.65931   2.650 0.008069 ** 
## EMPLOY1Homemaker             -0.25404    0.52201  -0.487 0.626514    
## EMPLOY1Student                0.79796    0.62461   1.278 0.201456    
## EMPLOY1Retired                2.02272    0.42067   4.808 1.55e-06 ***
## EMPLOY1Unable to work         6.80052    0.46678  14.569  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 206.3 on 7088 degrees of freedom
##   (2868 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1373, Adjusted R-squared:  0.132 
## F-statistic: 26.23 on 43 and 7088 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
## ========= 线性回归模型诊断（基于已拟合好的 fit_w） =========

## 1) 四联图：同时检查线性关系、正态性、同方差性和影响点
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(fit_w)                  # Residuals vs Fitted / QQ / Scale-Location / Cook's distance

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))         # 画完恢复布局

## 2) 异方差检验：Breusch–Pagan test
##    H0：残差方差为常数（同方差）；p < 0.05 说明存在异方差
library(lmtest)
bptest(fit_w)
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  fit_w
## BP = 4026651, df = 43, p-value < 2.2e-16
## 3) 稳健标准误（HC3）：只替换协方差矩阵，仍然是 lm 模型
##    用于在存在异方差时，得到更稳健的标准误和显著性检验
library(sandwich)
coeftest(fit_w, vcov. = vcovHC(fit_w, type = "HC3"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                  11.499922   3.978615  2.8904 0.0038588 ** 
## smoke_statusFormer smoker     1.730188   0.543143  3.1855 0.0014513 ** 
## smoke_statusDaily smoker      2.721860   0.824941  3.2995 0.0009735 ***
## smoke_statusSometimes smoker  1.449544   1.020105  1.4210 0.1553679    
## `_AGEG5YR`25–29              -0.395899   1.316395 -0.3007 0.7636179    
## `_AGEG5YR`30–34              -1.177356   1.150943 -1.0229 0.3063669    
## `_AGEG5YR`35–39              -1.406351   1.165690 -1.2065 0.2276830    
## `_AGEG5YR`40–44              -0.633525   1.738123 -0.3645 0.7155045    
## `_AGEG5YR`45–49              -2.431882   1.375795 -1.7676 0.0771676 .  
## `_AGEG5YR`50–54              -2.351069   1.232848 -1.9070 0.0565580 .  
## `_AGEG5YR`55–59              -2.860230   1.296292 -2.2065 0.0273830 *  
## `_AGEG5YR`60–64              -4.874674   1.103853 -4.4161 1.020e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`65–69              -4.868147   1.280207 -3.8026 0.0001444 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`70–74              -5.338049   1.358007 -3.9308 8.547e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`75–79              -6.165658   1.428753 -4.3154 1.615e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`80–84              -5.823879   1.691355 -3.4433 0.0005779 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`85+                -5.161305   1.451722 -3.5553 0.0003800 ***
## SEXVARMale                   -1.269345   0.468042 -2.7120 0.0067034 ** 
## INCOME3$10–<15k              -0.652609   1.979455 -0.3297 0.7416431    
## INCOME3$15–<20k              -0.228595   1.860831 -0.1228 0.9022329    
## INCOME3$20–<25k              -2.562718   1.656729 -1.5469 0.1219432    
## INCOME3$25–<35k              -1.795836   1.469221 -1.2223 0.2216330    
## INCOME3$35–<50k              -2.240240   1.506196 -1.4873 0.1369669    
## INCOME3$50–<75k              -2.126446   1.547490 -1.3741 0.1694462    
## INCOME3≥$75k                 -2.756138   1.500806 -1.8364 0.0663347 .  
## EDUCAGrades 1–8              -1.570197   3.512899 -0.4470 0.6549028    
## EDUCAGrades 9–11              0.286016   3.562837  0.0803 0.9360188    
## EDUCAHS/GED                  -0.102483   3.374661 -0.0304 0.9757740    
## EDUCASome college             0.493819   3.360284  0.1470 0.8831698    
## EDUCACollege ≥4y              0.044952   3.351640  0.0134 0.9892996    
## EXERANY2Yes                  -1.224074   0.577273 -2.1204 0.0340034 *  
## SLEPTIM1                     -0.346794   0.161098 -2.1527 0.0313766 *  
## MARITALDivorced               1.580514   0.645242  2.4495 0.0143299 *  
## MARITALWidowed                0.516136   0.934380  0.5524 0.5807029    
## MARITALSeparated              0.582366   1.329885  0.4379 0.6614672    
## MARITALNever married          1.656907   0.792435  2.0909 0.0365719 *  
## MARITALUnmarried couple       0.706126   0.951214  0.7423 0.4579050    
## EMPLOY1Self-employed         -1.250849   0.933444 -1.3400 0.1802767    
## EMPLOY1Out ≥1y                1.036620   1.503985  0.6892 0.4906891    
## EMPLOY1Out <1y                1.747097   1.542196  1.1329 0.2573100    
## EMPLOY1Homemaker             -0.254043   1.031977 -0.2462 0.8055571    
## EMPLOY1Student                0.797960   1.700749  0.4692 0.6389544    
## EMPLOY1Retired                2.022725   0.852592  2.3724 0.0176975 *  
## EMPLOY1Unable to work         6.800516   1.259525  5.3993 6.908e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 4) 多重共线性：方差膨胀因子 VIF
##    一般 VIF < 5（有的教材用 < 10）认为共线性问题不严重
library(car)
vif(fit_w)
##                  GVIF Df GVIF^(1/(2*Df))
## smoke_status 1.266931  3        1.040221
## `_AGEG5YR`   5.782630 13        1.069824
## SEXVAR       1.112538  1        1.054769
## INCOME3      1.780841  7        1.042082
## EDUCA        1.450120  5        1.037864
## EXERANY2     1.119982  1        1.058292
## SLEPTIM1     1.050465  1        1.024922
## MARITAL      2.086386  5        1.076315
## EMPLOY1      5.230752  7        1.125449
## 5) 杠杆值（leverage）检查：识别“在 X 空间里很边缘”的点
hatv <- hatvalues(fit_w)
head(hatv)                    # 先看前几行
##            1            2            4            5            6            8 
## 0.0060484612 0.0380858632 0.0072817022 0.0005158757 0.0142587878 0.0031196913
n <- nrow(model.frame(fit_w)) # 样本量（模型真正用到的观测数）
p <- fit_w$rank               # 模型中估计的参数个数（含截距）
lev_cut <- 2 * p / n          # 常用经验阈值：2p / n

lev_cut                      # 打印阈值
## [1] 0.01233875
which(hatv > lev_cut)        # 高杠杆点所在的行号（integer(0) 代表无）
##    2    6   15   17   20   25   34   46   68   69   88   97  108  111  138  141 
##    2    5   11   12   15   18   23   32   48   49   62   67   74   76   97   99

## 6211 6214 6218 6235 6237 6243 6248 6254 6264 6265 6300 6311 6336 6366 6391 6408 
## 4438 4439 4442 4453 4455 4459 4463 4468 4476 4477 4500 4508 4526 4546 4566 4578 
## 6414 6415 6434 6438 6457 6464 6501 6510 6515 6518 6526 6545 6555 6557 6566 6569 
## 4583 4584 4599 4602 4611 4616 4645 4653 4658 4660 4666 4678 4687 4688 4695 4698 
## 6574 6600 6602 6603 6605 6652 6685 6696 6706 6715 6717 6720 6749 6752 6754 6783 
## 4702 4719 4720 4721 4722 4758 4780 4789 4796 4804 4806 4809 4832 4835 4837 4858

## 8536 8542 8573 8593 8596 8599 8607 8627 8629 8644 8645 8651 8657 8677 8685 8686 
## 6099 6105 6129 6141 6144 6147 6152 6165 6166 6177 6178 6183 6186 6200 6204 6205 
## 8698 8705 8716 8722 8742 8753 8755 8756 8804 8811 8831 8835 8850 8879 8901 8907 
## 6212 6217 6225 6229 6245 6252 6253 6254 6286 6289 6302 6306 6312 6330 6345 6349 
## 8909 8913 8922 8924 8951 8966 8985 9014 9036 9056 9060 9091 9131 9134 9175 9180 
## 6351 6354 6359 6360 6378 6392 6406 6427 6443 6458 6460 6484 6516 6519 6546 6550 
## 9186 9219 9224 9231 9242 9244 9256 9282 9292 9296 9304 9332 9339 9344 9356 9363 
## 6555 6581 6585 6591 6600 6602 6609 6627 6637 6639 6644 6666 6673 6676 6687 6694 
## 9366 9368 9380 9383 9402 9404 9408 9419 9426 9434 9439 9451 9457 9473 9491 9503 
## 6697 6699 6708 6710 6720 6722 6725 6733 6738 6743 6747 6754 6758 6770 6781 6792 
## 9517 9539 9553 9574 9581 9582 9611 9618 9642 9663 9667 9683 9702 9711 9713 9721 
## 6800 6812 6824 6839 6843 6844 6864 6868 6884 6897 6900 6910 6921 6926 6927 6932 
## 9726 9737 9758 9762 9770 9775 9787 9790 9795 9808 9809 9817 9825 9842 9868 9869 
## 6936 6946 6962 6964 6970 6974 6981 6983 6985 6994 6995 7001 7008 7022 7042 7043 
## 9879 9885 9896 9934 9952 9959 9964 9971 9978 
## 7050 7053 7061 7089 7102 7109 7112 7115 7121
summary(hatv)                # 杠杆值整体分布
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## 1.982e-06 1.029e-03 2.513e-03 6.169e-03 6.036e-03 2.993e-01
## 6) 异常点（outliers）：学生化残差（studentized residual）
stud <- rstudent(fit_w)       # 每个观测的学生化残差
stud[which.max(abs(stud))]    # 绝对值最大的那一个残差
##      287 
## 11.52839
## Bonferroni 校正：计算临界值 qt(1 - alpha/(2n), df = n - p)
alpha <- 0.05
crit_stud <- qt(1 - alpha / (2 * n), df = n - p)
crit_stud                     # 打印临界值
## [1] 4.496725
## 所有被判定为异常点的观测行号（如果输出 integer(0)，说明没有）
which(abs(stud) > crit_stud)
##   17  287  328  350  652  770  937 1272 1322 1362 1900 2193 2205 2897 2909 2982 
##   12  202  229  242  459  538  646  886  925  954 1349 1558 1564 2050 2061 2110 
## 3171 3214 3345 3753 4010 4044 4367 4401 4665 4794 4893 5197 5377 5870 6720 6836 
## 2256 2279 2379 2675 2852 2877 3120 3145 3334 3417 3489 3714 3832 4193 4809 4892 
## 7030 7155 7309 7453 7467 7498 7543 7573 8138 8250 8437 8514 8645 9582 9618 9667 
## 5036 5135 5237 5341 5351 5377 5404 5425 5824 5903 6028 6082 6178 6844 6868 6900 
## 9959 
## 7109
## 7) 影响点（influential points）：Cook 距离
cook <- cooks.distance(fit_w)

## 常用经验阈值：F 分布的某个分位数，这里用 qf(0.5, p, n - p) 作为参考
crit_cook <- qf(0.5, df1 = p, df2 = n - p)
crit_cook                      # 打印 Cook 距离阈值
## [1] 0.9849827
## Cook 距离大于阈值的观测行号（如果输出 integer(0)，说明没有明显影响点）
which(cook > crit_cook)
## named integer(0)
## 1) 以 sqrt(MENTHLTH + 0.5) 为新的结局变量
dat_small <- dat_small %>%
  mutate(MENTHLTH_sqrt = sqrt(MENTHLTH + 0.5))

## 2) 拟合加权最小二乘（WLS）主模型：协变量同原来
fit_w_sqrt <- lm(MENTHLTH_sqrt ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR +
                   INCOME3 + EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 +
                   MARITAL + EMPLOY1,
                 data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`)

summary(fit_w_sqrt)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = MENTHLTH_sqrt ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + 
##     INCOME3 + EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1, 
##     data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`)
## 
## Weighted Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -254.45  -15.66   -5.46    7.93  377.20 
## 
## Coefficients:

## (Intercept)                   3.10710    0.40884   7.600 3.35e-14 ***

## smoke_statusDaily smoker      0.44073    0.06105   7.220 5.76e-13 ***
## smoke_statusSometimes smoker  0.29015    0.08290   3.500 0.000468 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`25–29              -0.12410    0.08381  -1.481 0.138758    
## `_AGEG5YR`30–34              -0.34508    0.08646  -3.991 6.64e-05 ***

## MARITALSeparated              0.14801    0.12407   1.193 0.232926    
## MARITALNever married          0.33455    0.05200   6.434 1.32e-10 ***

## EMPLOY1Self-employed         -0.25826    0.06461  -3.997 6.47e-05 ***
## EMPLOY1Out ≥1y                0.19253    0.11072   1.739 0.082108 .  
## EMPLOY1Out <1y                0.25464    0.11358   2.242 0.025000 *

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 35.53 on 7088 degrees of freedom
##   (2868 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1484, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1432 
## F-statistic: 28.73 on 43 and 7088 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
## ===== 模型诊断 for fit_w_sqrt =====

## 1) 四联图：线性、正态性、同方差、影响点
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(fit_w_sqrt)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

## 2) Breusch–Pagan 异方差检验
library(lmtest)
bptest(fit_w_sqrt)   # 希望 p 值变大一些，异方差缓解
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  fit_w_sqrt
## BP = 4026842, df = 43, p-value < 2.2e-16
## 3) 稳健标准误（HC3）
library(sandwich)
coeftest(fit_w_sqrt, vcov. = vcovHC(fit_w_sqrt, type = "HC3"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)

## smoke_statusSometimes smoker  0.290151   0.190090  1.5264 0.1269590

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 4) 多重共线性：VIF
library(car)
vif(fit_w_sqrt)
##                  GVIF Df GVIF^(1/(2*Df))
## smoke_status 1.266931  3        1.040221
## `_AGEG5YR`   5.782630 13        1.069824
## SEXVAR       1.112538  1        1.054769
## INCOME3      1.780841  7        1.042082
## EDUCA        1.450120  5        1.037864
## EXERANY2     1.119982  1        1.058292
## SLEPTIM1     1.050465  1        1.024922
## MARITAL      2.086386  5        1.076315
## EMPLOY1      5.230752  7        1.125449
## 5) 杠杆值（leverage）检查
hatv_s <- hatvalues(fit_w_sqrt)
summary(hatv_s)
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## 1.982e-06 1.029e-03 2.513e-03 6.169e-03 6.036e-03 2.993e-01
n_s <- nrow(model.frame(fit_w_sqrt))   # 样本量
p_s <- fit_w_sqrt$rank                 # 模型参数个数（含截距）
lev_cut_s <- 2 * p_s / n_s             # 常用阈值 2p/n

which(hatv_s > lev_cut_s)             # 高杠杆点行号（可能很多，只要不极端就写描述）

## 7050 7053 7061 7089 7102 7109 7112 7115 7121
## 6) 异常值（studentized residuals）
stud_s <- rstudent(fit_w_sqrt)
max(abs(stud_s))                       # 看一下最大绝对值
## [1] 11.48815
# Bonferroni 临界值
crit_bonf <- qt(1 - 0.05 / (2 * n_s), df = n_s - p_s)
crit_bonf
## [1] 4.496725
which(abs(stud_s) > crit_bonf)         # 一般为空：说明无显著异常值
##   17  287  328  350  770 1272 1322 1362 2205 2897 2909 2982 3171 3345 3525 3753 
##   12  202  229  242  538  886  925  954 1564 2050 2061 2110 2256 2379 2516 2675 
## 4044 4367 4401 4665 4794 4893 5197 5377 5870 6264 6836 7030 7155 7453 7467 7573 
## 2877 3120 3145 3334 3417 3489 3714 3832 4193 4476 4892 5036 5135 5341 5351 5425 
## 8138 8250 8437 8514 8644 8645 9582 9667 9959 
## 5824 5903 6028 6082 6177 6178 6844 6900 7109
## 7) 影响点（Cook's distance）
cook_s <- cooks.distance(fit_w_sqrt)
summary(cook_s)
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## 0.000e+00 7.500e-07 8.280e-06 7.455e-04 7.580e-05 4.415e-01
# 常用经验阈值：4/n 或 F 分布阈值（你之前用的是 qf(0.5, p, n-p)）
cook_cut <- 4 / n_s
cook_cut
## [1] 0.0005608525
which(cook_s > cook_cut)               # 少量点超出就描述为“少数可能影响点”

## 8829 8831 8835 8850 8879 8901 8907 8909 8913 8951 8965 8966 8985 9014 9036 9048 
## 6300 6302 6306 6312 6330 6345 6349 6351 6354 6378 6391 6392 6406 6427 6443 6451 
## 9060 9131 9134 9175 9180 9186 9219 9226 9244 9255 9282 9304 9305 9317 9344 9363 
## 6460 6516 6519 6546 6550 6555 6581 6586 6602 6608 6627 6644 6645 6655 6676 6694 
## 9366 9380 9383 9402 9404 9408 9434 9439 9473 9491 9503 9517 9574 9582 9611 9618 
## 6697 6708 6710 6720 6722 6725 6743 6747 6770 6781 6792 6800 6839 6844 6864 6868 
## 9642 9654 9663 9667 9683 9702 9711 9726 9737 9738 9750 9758 9762 9785 9787 9790 
## 6884 6891 6897 6900 6910 6921 6926 6936 6946 6947 6956 6962 6964 6979 6981 6983 
## 9795 9808 9809 9817 9842 9868 9869 9897 9946 9952 9959 9964 9971 9986 
## 6985 6994 6995 7001 7022 7042 7043 7062 7098 7102 7109 7112 7115 7125
library(MASS)
## 
## Attaching package: 'MASS'
## The following object is masked from 'package:gtsummary':
## 
##     select
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     select
y <- dat_small$MENTHLTH + 0.1   # 确保为正
fit0 <- lm(
  y ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + INCOME3 + EDUCA +
          EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1 ,
  data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`
)

bc   <- boxcox(fit0, plotit = TRUE)

lam  <- bc$x[which.max(bc$y)]
## ===== Box-Cox 版本（与其余模型同一右端式）=====
library(MASS)
library(lmtest)

# (若还没建过) √ 版本的因变量
if (!"MENTHLTH_sqrt" %in% names(dat_small)) {
  dat_small$MENTHLTH_sqrt <- sqrt(dat_small$MENTHLTH + 0.5)
}

# 先对 y(+0.1) 做 MLE 选 λ（右端式与 fit_w 一致）
y_pos <- dat_small$MENTHLTH + 0.1
fit0_bc <- lm(
  y_pos ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + INCOME3 + EDUCA +
          EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1,
  data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`
)
bc      <- boxcox(fit0_bc, plotit = TRUE)      # 需要图就留 TRUE

lam_hat <- bc$x[which.max(bc$y)]               # 估计到的 λ

# Box–Cox 变换
bc_tr <- function(z, lam) if (abs(lam) < 1e-8) log(z) else (z^lam - 1)/lam
dat_small$y_bc <- bc_tr(y_pos, lam_hat)
## ==== packages ====
library(MASS)    # boxcox
library(lmtest)  # bptest
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

## ==== 统一自变量（与你给的 fit_w / fit_sqrt / fit_log 一致）====
rhs <- reformulate(c("smoke_status","`_AGEG5YR`","INCOME3","EDUCA",
                     "EXERANY2","SLEPTIM1","MARITAL"))

## ---- 小工具：权重RMSE（原尺度）+ 反变换 ----
wrmse <- function(err, w) sqrt(sum(w * err^2) / sum(w))
inv_pred <- function(eta, type, lam = NULL) {
  switch(type,
         orig   = eta,
         sqrt   = pmax(eta^2 - 0.5, 0),
         log    = pmax(exp(eta) - 0.1, 0),
         boxcox = pmax((lam * eta + 1)^(1/lam) - 0.1, 0))
}

## ==== 估计 Box-Cox 的 λ（对 y+0.1，右端式与上面一致）====
tmp <- dat_small
tmp$y_pos <- dat_small$MENTHLTH + 0.1
bc_fit <- lm(update(rhs, y_pos ~ .), data = tmp, weights = tmp[["_LLCPWT"]])
bc     <- boxcox(bc_fit, plotit = FALSE)
lam_hat <- bc$x[which.max(bc$y)]   # 一般接近 -0.18

## ==== 拟合四个模型（各自在其变换尺度上）====
fit_w    <- lm(update(rhs, MENTHLTH ~ .), data = dat_small, weights = dat_small[["_LLCPWT"]])
fit_sqrt <- lm(update(rhs, sqrt(MENTHLTH + 0.5) ~ .), data = dat_small, weights = dat_small[["_LLCPWT"]])
fit_log  <- lm(update(rhs, log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ .),  data = dat_small, weights = dat_small[["_LLCPWT"]])
fit_bc   <- lm(update(rhs, ((MENTHLTH + 0.1)^lam_hat - 1)/lam_hat ~ .),
               data = dat_small, weights = dat_small[["_LLCPWT"]])

## ==== 原始尺度的加权训练 RMSE ====
w <- dat_small[["_LLCPWT"]]
y <- dat_small$MENTHLTH

rmse_w    <- wrmse(predict(fit_w)                         - y, w)
## Warning in predict(fit_w) - y: longer object length is not a multiple of
## shorter object length
rmse_sqrt <- wrmse(inv_pred(predict(fit_sqrt), "sqrt")    - y, w)
## Warning in inv_pred(predict(fit_sqrt), "sqrt") - y: longer object length is not
## a multiple of shorter object length
rmse_log  <- wrmse(inv_pred(predict(fit_log),  "log")     - y, w)
## Warning in inv_pred(predict(fit_log), "log") - y: longer object length is not a
## multiple of shorter object length
rmse_bc   <- wrmse(inv_pred(predict(fit_bc),   "boxcox", lam_hat) - y, w)
## Warning in inv_pred(predict(fit_bc), "boxcox", lam_hat) - y: longer object
## length is not a multiple of shorter object length
## ==== 汇总表（仅 AIC、BP p、RMSE）====
tab <- tibble(
  Model = c("Original", "Sqrt(+0.5)", "Log(+0.1)", sprintf("BoxCox(+0.1, λ=%.3f)", lam_hat)),
  AIC   = c(AIC(fit_w), AIC(fit_sqrt), AIC(fit_log), AIC(fit_bc)),
  `BP_p`= c(bptest(fit_w)$p.value, bptest(fit_sqrt)$p.value,
            bptest(fit_log)$p.value, bptest(fit_bc)$p.value),
  RMSE_w = c(rmse_w, rmse_sqrt, rmse_log, rmse_bc)  # 原始尺度、加权
)

tab %>% arrange(RMSE_w)
fit_log <- lm(
  log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + INCOME3 +
    EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1 ,
  data = dat_small,
  weights = `_LLCPWT`
)

summary(fit_log)
##

## lm(formula = log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + 
##     SEXVAR + INCOME3 + EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + 
##     EMPLOY1, data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`)
##

## -337.74  -25.31   -8.11   26.96  472.98

## MARITALUnmarried couple       0.15614    0.11965   1.305 0.191947    
## EMPLOY1Self-employed         -0.41339    0.09129  -4.529 6.04e-06 ***
## EMPLOY1Out ≥1y                0.26019    0.15644   1.663 0.096324 .  
## EMPLOY1Out <1y                0.20309    0.16048   1.265 0.205734    
## EMPLOY1Homemaker             -0.11737    0.12706  -0.924 0.355667    
## EMPLOY1Student                0.19644    0.15204   1.292 0.196394    
## EMPLOY1Retired                0.41809    0.10240   4.083 4.49e-05 ***
## EMPLOY1Unable to work         1.33475    0.11362  11.747  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 50.21 on 7088 degrees of freedom
##   (2868 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1542, Adjusted R-squared:  0.149 
## F-statistic: 30.05 on 43 and 7088 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
## 1) 四联图：线性、正态性、同方差、影响点
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(fit_log)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

## 2) Breusch–Pagan 异方差检验
library(lmtest)
bptest(fit_log)   # 希望 p 值变大一些，异方差缓解
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  fit_log
## BP = 4027413, df = 43, p-value < 2.2e-16
## 3) 稳健标准误（HC3）
library(sandwich)
coeftest(fit_log, vcov. = vcovHC(fit_log, type = "HC3"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   1.729693   0.976009  1.7722 0.0764025 .  
## smoke_statusFormer smoker     0.483744   0.131353  3.6828 0.0002324 ***
## smoke_statusDaily smoker      0.551670   0.173963  3.1712 0.0015246 ** 
## smoke_statusSometimes smoker  0.455075   0.284934  1.5971 0.1102822    
## `_AGEG5YR`25–29              -0.267752   0.333003 -0.8041 0.4213942    
## `_AGEG5YR`30–34              -0.749891   0.283139 -2.6485 0.0081032 ** 
## `_AGEG5YR`35–39              -0.584366   0.295562 -1.9771 0.0480651 *  
## `_AGEG5YR`40–44              -0.479411   0.408545 -1.1735 0.2406509    
## `_AGEG5YR`45–49              -1.209680   0.318275 -3.8007 0.0001455 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`50–54              -1.146796   0.287777 -3.9850 6.815e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`55–59              -1.179882   0.299199 -3.9435 8.109e-05 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`60–64              -1.555437   0.275961 -5.6364 1.803e-08 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`65–69              -1.720891   0.303658 -5.6672 1.509e-08 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`70–74              -1.832562   0.317790 -5.7666 8.430e-09 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`75–79              -2.036371   0.335329 -6.0728 1.322e-09 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`80–84              -1.869618   0.394349 -4.7410 2.168e-06 ***
## `_AGEG5YR`85+                -1.568836   0.533886 -2.9385 0.0033084 ** 
## SEXVARMale                   -0.605723   0.117893 -5.1379 2.852e-07 ***
## INCOME3$10–<15k              -0.120338   0.430850 -0.2793 0.7800198    
## INCOME3$15–<20k               0.012164   0.347204  0.0350 0.9720539    
## INCOME3$20–<25k              -0.665926   0.385164 -1.7289 0.0838635 .  
## INCOME3$25–<35k              -0.247835   0.316632 -0.7827 0.4338173    
## INCOME3$35–<50k              -0.327085   0.329602 -0.9924 0.3210543    
## INCOME3$50–<75k              -0.346407   0.345059 -1.0039 0.3154576    
## INCOME3≥$75k                 -0.432477   0.333597 -1.2964 0.1948790    
## EDUCAGrades 1–8              -0.515798   0.943950 -0.5464 0.5847910    
## EDUCAGrades 9–11             -0.437490   0.901396 -0.4853 0.6274449    
## EDUCAHS/GED                  -0.370318   0.870939 -0.4252 0.6707081    
## EDUCASome college            -0.180591   0.871038 -0.2073 0.8357589    
## EDUCACollege ≥4y             -0.121581   0.867053 -0.1402 0.8884873    
## EXERANY2Yes                  -0.149121   0.135497 -1.1005 0.2711329    
## SLEPTIM1                     -0.096045   0.033956 -2.8285 0.0046902 ** 
## MARITALDivorced               0.422871   0.160867  2.6287 0.0085896 ** 
## MARITALWidowed                0.049604   0.210867  0.2352 0.8140291    
## MARITALSeparated              0.360545   0.337701  1.0676 0.2857162    
## MARITALNever married          0.529461   0.202834  2.6103 0.0090648 ** 
## MARITALUnmarried couple       0.156139   0.257329  0.6068 0.5440242    
## EMPLOY1Self-employed         -0.413390   0.242083 -1.7076 0.0877476 .  
## EMPLOY1Out ≥1y                0.260188   0.334843  0.7770 0.4371579    
## EMPLOY1Out <1y                0.203093   0.358901  0.5659 0.5714980    
## EMPLOY1Homemaker             -0.117372   0.301858 -0.3888 0.6974134    
## EMPLOY1Student                0.196437   0.317908  0.6179 0.5366580    
## EMPLOY1Retired                0.418089   0.195505  2.1385 0.0325093 *  
## EMPLOY1Unable to work         1.334752   0.243300  5.4860 4.252e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 4) 多重共线性：VIF
library(car)
vif(fit_log)
##                  GVIF Df GVIF^(1/(2*Df))
## smoke_status 1.266931  3        1.040221
## `_AGEG5YR`   5.782630 13        1.069824
## SEXVAR       1.112538  1        1.054769
## INCOME3      1.780841  7        1.042082
## EDUCA        1.450120  5        1.037864
## EXERANY2     1.119982  1        1.058292
## SLEPTIM1     1.050465  1        1.024922
## MARITAL      2.086386  5        1.076315
## EMPLOY1      5.230752  7        1.125449
## 5) 杠杆值（leverage）检查
hatv_s <- hatvalues(fit_log)
summary(hatv_s)
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## 1.982e-06 1.029e-03 2.513e-03 6.169e-03 6.036e-03 2.993e-01
n_s <- nrow(model.frame(fit_log))   # 样本量
p_s <- fit_log$rank                 # 模型参数个数（含截距）
lev_cut_s <- 2 * p_s / n_s             # 常用阈值 2p/n

which(hatv_s > lev_cut_s)             # 高杠杆点行号（可能很多，只要不极端就写描述）
##    2    6   15   17   20   25   34   46   68   69   88   97  108  111  138  141

## 9879 9885 9896 9934 9952 9959 9964 9971 9978 
## 7050 7053 7061 7089 7102 7109 7112 7115 7121
## 6) 异常值（studentized residuals）
stud_s <- rstudent(fit_log)
max(abs(stud_s))                       # 看一下最大绝对值
## [1] 10.17531
# Bonferroni 临界值
crit_bonf <- qt(1 - 0.05 / (2 * n_s), df = n_s - p_s)
crit_bonf
## [1] 4.496725
which(abs(stud_s) > crit_bonf)         # 一般为空：说明无显著异常值
##  183  287  328 1272 1418 2982 3345 3525 3753 4044 4367 4401 4406 4942 5197 5377 
##  129  202  229  886 1002 2110 2379 2516 2675 2877 3120 3145 3150 3525 3714 3832 
## 5852 5870 5928 7155 7573 8138 8250 8644 8966 9667 
## 4182 4193 4234 5135 5425 5824 5903 6177 6392 6900
## 7) 影响点（Cook's distance）
cook_s <- cooks.distance(fit_log)
summary(cook_s)
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## 0.000e+00 1.850e-06 1.524e-05 7.370e-04 1.057e-04 5.834e-01
# 常用经验阈值：4/n 或 F 分布阈值（你之前用的是 qf(0.5, p, n-p)）
cook_cut <- 4 / n_s
cook_cut
## [1] 0.0005608525
which(cook_s > cook_cut)               # 少量点超出就描述为“少数可能影响点”
##    2    6   15   17   25   34   46   50   68   69   88  108  111  120  138  141 
##    2    5   11   12   18   23   32   34   48   49   62   74   76   83   97   99

## 9282 9304 9305 9317 9332 9344 9356 9363 9366 9370 9380 9383 9402 9404 9408 9439 
## 6627 6644 6645 6655 6666 6676 6687 6694 6697 6701 6708 6710 6720 6722 6725 6747 
## 9451 9457 9470 9473 9491 9503 9517 9553 9574 9582 9589 9611 9618 9642 9654 9663 
## 6754 6758 6767 6770 6781 6792 6800 6824 6839 6844 6850 6864 6868 6884 6891 6897 
## 9667 9683 9702 9711 9726 9737 9748 9750 9758 9762 9770 9787 9790 9795 9808 9809 
## 6900 6910 6921 6926 6936 6946 6954 6956 6962 6964 6970 6981 6983 6985 6994 6995 
## 9817 9842 9868 9869 9896 9897 9959 9964 9971 9986 9987 
## 7001 7022 7042 7043 7061 7062 7109 7112 7115 7125 7126
fit_log2 <- lm(
  log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + INCOME3 +
    EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1 + I(SLEPTIM1^2) + EXERANY2:smoke_status ,
  data = dat_small,
  weights = `_LLCPWT`
)

summary(fit_log2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + 
##     SEXVAR + INCOME3 + EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + 
##     EMPLOY1 + I(SLEPTIM1^2) + EXERANY2:smoke_status, data = dat_small, 
##     weights = `_LLCPWT`)

## 
## Residual standard error: 49.96 on 7084 degrees of freedom
##   (2868 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1628, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1572 
## F-statistic:  29.3 on 47 and 7084 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
## 1) 四联图：线性、正态性、同方差、影响点
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(fit_log2)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

## 2) Breusch–Pagan 异方差检验
library(lmtest)
bptest(fit_log2)   # 希望 p 值变大一些，异方差缓解
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  fit_log2
## BP = 4027418, df = 47, p-value < 2.2e-16
## 3) 稳健标准误（HC3）
library(sandwich)
coeftest(fit_log2, vcov. = vcovHC(fit_log2, type = "HC3"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                                            Estimate Std. Error t value

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 4) 多重共线性：VIF
library(car)
vif(fit_log2, type = "predictor")
## Warning in vif.lm(fit_log2, type = "predictor"): type = 'predictor' is available only for unweighted linear models;
##   type = 'terms' will be used
##                            GVIF Df GVIF^(1/(2*Df))
## smoke_status          38.703173  3        1.839181
## `_AGEG5YR`             5.992159 13        1.071290
## SEXVAR                 1.116276  1        1.056539
## INCOME3                1.803019  7        1.043003
## EDUCA                  1.474536  5        1.039598
## EXERANY2               2.002997  1        1.415273
## SLEPTIM1              10.717777  1        3.273802
## MARITAL                2.101763  5        1.077106
## EMPLOY1                5.362360  7        1.127449
## I(SLEPTIM1^2)         10.636154  1        3.261312
## smoke_status:EXERANY2 43.844354  3        1.877813
## 5) 杠杆值（leverage）检查
hatv_s <- hatvalues(fit_log2)
summary(hatv_s)
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## 2.049e-06 1.105e-03 2.710e-03 6.730e-03 6.563e-03 3.014e-01
n_s <- nrow(model.frame(fit_log2))   # 样本量
p_s <- fit_log2$rank                 # 模型参数个数（含截距）
lev_cut_s <- 2 * p_s / n_s             # 常用阈值 2p/n

which(hatv_s > lev_cut_s)             # 高杠杆点行号（可能很多，只要不极端就写描述）

## 9959 9964 9971 9978 
## 7109 7112 7115 7121
## 6) 异常值（studentized residuals）
stud_s <- rstudent(fit_log2)
max(abs(stud_s))                       # 看一下最大绝对值
## [1] 10.17189
# Bonferroni 临界值
crit_bonf <- qt(1 - 0.05 / (2 * n_s), df = n_s - p_s)
crit_bonf
## [1] 4.496727
which(abs(stud_s) > crit_bonf)         # 一般为空：说明无显著异常值
##  183  287  328 1272 1418 2982 3345 3525 3753 4044 4367 4401 4406 4942 5197 5870 
##  129  202  229  886 1002 2110 2379 2516 2675 2877 3120 3145 3150 3525 3714 4193 
## 5928 6154 6248 7155 7573 8138 8250 8644 8966 9180 9667 9959 
## 4234 4398 4463 5135 5425 5824 5903 6177 6392 6550 6900 7109
## 7) 影响点（influential points）：Cook 距离
cook <- cooks.distance(fit_log2)

## 常用经验阈值：F 分布的某个分位数，这里用 qf(0.5, p, n - p) 作为参考
crit_cook <- qf(0.5, df1 = p, df2 = n - p)
crit_cook                      # 打印 Cook 距离阈值
## [1] 0.9849827
## Cook 距离大于阈值的观测行号（如果输出 integer(0)，说明没有明显影响点）
which(cook > crit_cook)
## named integer(0)
## ========= helpers：加权指标 + 安全封装 =========
rmse_w <- function(y, yhat, w) sqrt(sum(w * (y - yhat)^2) / sum(w))
mae_w  <- function(y, yhat, w) sum(w * abs(y - yhat)) / sum(w)
r2_w   <- function(y, yhat, w) {
  num <- sum(w * (y - yhat)^2)
  den <- sum(w * (y - weighted.mean(y, w))^2)
  1 - num / den
}
safe_metrics <- function(y, yhat, w){
  ok <- is.finite(y) & is.finite(yhat) & is.finite(w) & (w > 0)
  tibble::tibble(
    RMSE_w = rmse_w(y[ok], yhat[ok], w[ok]),
    MAE_w  = mae_w (y[ok], yhat[ok], w[ok]),
    R2_w   = r2_w  (y[ok], yhat[ok], w[ok])
  )
}

## ========= 公式（与你当前模型一致）=========
rhs <- MENTHLTH ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + SEXVAR + INCOME3 +
                  EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL + EMPLOY1

## ========= 划分 8k / 2k =========
set.seed(2025)
id_te <- sample(seq_len(nrow(dat_small)), 2000)
te <- dat_small[id_te, ]
tr <- dat_small[-id_te, ]

w_tr <- tr$`_LLCPWT`; w_te <- te$`_LLCPWT`
y_te <- te$MENTHLTH

## ========= 1) 原尺度 WLS =========
fit_w_tr <- lm(rhs, data = tr, weights = `_LLCPWT`)
pred_w   <- predict(fit_w_tr, newdata = te)  # 已是“天数”

## ========= 2) √ 变换 + smearing 回原尺度 =========
fit_sqrt_tr <- lm(update(rhs, sqrt(MENTHLTH + 0.5) ~ .),
                  data = tr, weights = `_LLCPWT`)
z_hat_te <- predict(fit_sqrt_tr, newdata = te)          # z = sqrt(y+0.5)
res_sqrt <- residuals(fit_sqrt_tr)                      # 在 √ 尺度的残差
# 加权 smearing 回变换：E[(mu+eps)^2 - 0.5]
pred_sqrt <- vapply(
  z_hat_te,
  function(mu) sum(w_tr * ((mu + res_sqrt)^2 - 0.5)) / sum(w_tr),
  numeric(1)
)
## Warning in w_tr * ((mu + res_sqrt)^2 - 0.5): longer object length is not a
## multiple of shorter object length
## Warning in w_tr * ((mu + res_sqrt)^2 - 0.5): longer object length is not a
## multiple of shorter object length

## multiple of shorter object length

## multiple of shorter object length

## multiple of shorter object length

## multiple of shorter object length

## multiple of shorter object length
## Warning in w_tr * ((mu + res_sqrt)^2 - 0.5): longer object length is not a
## multiple of shorter object length
## Warning in w_tr * ((mu + res_sqrt)^2 - 0.5): longer object length is not a
## multiple of shorter object length
## Warning in w_tr * ((mu + res_sqrt)^2 - 0.5): longer object length is not a
## multiple of shorter object length
## ========= 3) log 变换 + smearing 回原尺度 =========
fit_log_tr <- lm(update(rhs, log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ .),
                 data = tr, weights = `_LLCPWT`)
eta_hat_te <- predict(fit_log_tr, newdata = te)         # eta = log(y+0.1)
res_log    <- residuals(fit_log_tr)
SF_log     <- sum(w_tr * exp(res_log)) / sum(w_tr)      # 加权 smearing 因子
## Warning in w_tr * exp(res_log): longer object length is not a multiple of
## shorter object length
pred_log   <- exp(eta_hat_te) * SF_log - 0.1            # 回到“天数”

## ========= 只展示：原模型 / √(smearing) / log(smearing) =========
library(tibble)
cmp <- tibble::tibble(
  Model  = c("Original WLS", "Sqrt (+0.5)", "Log (+0.1)")
) |>
  dplyr::bind_cols(dplyr::bind_rows(
    safe_metrics(y_te, pred_w,   w_te),
    safe_metrics(y_te, pred_sqrt, w_te),
    safe_metrics(y_te, pred_log,  w_te)
  ))

cmp
# === 需要的包 ===
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(broom)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(car)        # Anova 的 white.adjust 支持稳健检验
library(tibble)

# 假设已经有最终模型：fit_log2
# fit_log2 <- lm(log(MENTHLTH + 0.1) ~ smoke_status + `_AGEG5YR` + INCOME3 +
#                  EDUCA + EXERANY2 + SLEPTIM1 + MARITAL +
#                  I(SLEPTIM1^2) + EXERANY2:smoke_status,
#                data = dat_small, weights = `_LLCPWT`)


# 推荐：Type III 用和为零对比
options(contrasts = c("contr.sum","contr.poly"))

anova_overall <- car::Anova(fit_log2, type = 3, white.adjust = "hc3")
## Coefficient covariances computed by hccm()
df_overall <- as.data.frame(anova_overall) |> tibble::rownames_to_column("Term")

# 自动抓取列名（F/Chisq、df、p列在不同模型下名字不同）
pcol    <- intersect(c("Pr(>F)", "Pr(>Chisq)", "Pr(>Wald)", "Pr(>LR)"), names(df_overall))[1]
statcol <- intersect(c("F value", "F", "Chisq", "Wald"),                        names(df_overall))[1]
dfcol   <- intersect(c("Df", "num Df"),                                        names(df_overall))[1]

tbl_all <- df_overall |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Statistic = .data[[statcol]],
    df1       = .data[[dfcol]],
    p.value   = .data[[pcol]],
    Sig = dplyr::case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    is_inter = grepl(":", Term)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(Term, df1, Statistic, p.value, Sig, is_inter) |>
  dplyr::arrange(p.value)

# 只保留显著（包括交互项）
tbl_sig <- tbl_all |> dplyr::filter(p.value < 0.05)

# 如果你想“只看显著的交互项”
tbl_inter_sig <- tbl_all |> dplyr::filter(is_inter, p.value < 0.05)

# 如果你想“主效应 + 显著交互项”，可以直接用 tbl_sig
tbl_sig
## === Annotated Residuals vs Leverage ===
## 依赖 fit_log2 已经拟合完毕（与你现在的最终模型一致）

p <- length(coef(fit_log2))           # 参数个数
n <- nobs(fit_log2)                   # 有效样本量
h <- hatvalues(fit_log2)              # 杠杆值 (leverage, hat)
r <- rstudent(fit_log2)               # 学生化残差
D <- cooks.distance(fit_log2)         # Cook's distance

h_cut <- 2 * p / n                    # 常用高杠杆阈值

op <- par(mar = c(4.2, 4.2, 1.2, 1.2))
plot(h, r,
     xlab = "Leverage (hat values)",
     ylab = "Studentized residuals",
     pch = 21,
     bg  = ifelse(D > 0.5 | h > h_cut, "tomato", "grey80"),
     col = ifelse(D > 0.5 | h > h_cut, "tomato4", "grey60"),
     cex = ifelse(D > 1, 1.2, 0.8))
abline(h = 0, col = "grey70")

## 高杠杆竖线：h = 2p/n
abline(v = h_cut, lty = 2, lwd = 1.4, col = "steelblue3")
text(h_cut, par("usr")[4], labels = expression(h==2*p/n),
     pos = 3, cex = .9, col = "steelblue3", xpd = NA)

## Cook's D 等值线（0.5 与 1）
cook.levels <- c(0.5, 1)
hh <- seq(max(min(h), 1e-4), max(h), length.out = 300)
for (d in cook.levels) {
  rr <- sqrt(d * p * (1 - hh) / hh)
  lines(hh,  rr, lty = 2, col = "grey55")
  lines(hh, -rr, lty = 2, col = "grey55")
  ## 右侧贴标
  xlabpos <- hh[which.max(hh)]
  ylabpos <- sqrt(d * p * (1 - xlabpos) / xlabpos)
  text(xlabpos,  ylabpos,  paste0("Cook's D = ", d),
       pos = 2, cex = .85, col = "grey40")
  text(xlabpos, -ylabpos, paste0("Cook's D = ", d),
       pos = 2, cex = .85, col = "grey40")
}

## 图例：高杠杆 / 可能影响点
legend("topleft",
       legend = c("High leverage (h > 2p/n)", "Likely influential (Cook's D > 0.5)"),
       pch = 21, pt.bg = c("white", "tomato"), pt.cex = c(1,1),
       col = c("steelblue3", "tomato4"), bty = "n", cex = .85)

par(op)
